issues.display_title: Issue #1479: Migrate Photographers ToolsController to strict ADR
issues.main_description_html:
Pattern: Category B — already delegates to Action class. Wrap to strict ADR (DTO + Repository + ExceptionMapper + ResponseEnvelopeHelper envelope).
Controller: ToolsController → app/Http/Controllers/Photographers/Tools/ToolsController.php
Endpoints:

Method Endpoint Action file ~lines
GET /photographers/tools Action/GetTools.php 65
POST /photographers/tools/add Action/Add.php 74
DELETE /photographers/tools/delete/{toolId} Action/Delete.php 60
Reference: docs/ADR_MIGRATION_CANDIDATES.md, docs/ARCH_RULES.md

Note from Developer

This issue is resolved via PR #1485. ToolsController replaced with 3 single-action controllers following strict Domain-Based ADR pattern.

Key changes:

  • Legacy ToolsController and Action/*.php files removed — replaced by 3 final single-action controllers
  • ToolService added with 3 typed HTTP methods (getTools, addTool, deleteTool) — upstream endpoint is /equipment (not /tools)
  • 3 new Action classes: GetToolsAction, AddToolAction, DeleteToolAction
  • AddToolDto added with fromArray factory and toPayload() (excludes null optional fields)
  • 3 new domain exceptions: ToolFetchFailedException (PHOTOGRAPHERS.TOOL_FETCH_FAILED → 422), ToolAddFailedException (PHOTOGRAPHERS.TOOL_ADD_FAILED → 409), ToolDeleteFailedException (PHOTOGRAPHERS.TOOL_DELETE_FAILED → 409)
  • SID resolution on getTools uses SuperUserHelper::isSuperUser() (current convention)
  • addTool validates type (in: 1,2,3,4) and name at the controller boundary

Affected API endpoints:

Method Endpoint Description API Docs
GET /photographers/tools Returns paginated tools list. SUPER_USER can pass ?sid=. get-tools.md
POST /photographers/tools/add Adds a tool. Requires type (1–4) and name. brand and specification are optional. add-tool.md
DELETE /photographers/tools/delete/{toolId} Deletes a tool by ID. Returns 409 on upstream failure. delete-tool.md

Error domain codes introduced:

Code HTTP When
PHOTOGRAPHERS.TOOL_FETCH_FAILED 422 Upstream returned error on tools fetch
PHOTOGRAPHERS.TOOL_ADD_FAILED 409 Upstream returned error on add
PHOTOGRAPHERS.TOOL_DELETE_FAILED 409 Upstream returned error on delete

issues.display_title: Issue #1476: Migrate Photographers SupportController to strict ADR
issues.main_description_html:
Pattern: Category B — already delegates to Action class. Wrap to strict ADR (DTO + Repository + ExceptionMapper + ResponseEnvelopeHelper envelope).
Controller: SupportController → app/Http/Controllers/Photographers/Support/SupportController.php
Endpoints:

Method Endpoint Action file ~lines
GET /photographers/support/request-featured-user Action/RequestFeaturedUser.php 80
POST /photographers/support/update-featured-status Action/UpdateFeaturedStatus.php 95
Already done (skip): SendSubmissionStatusEmailController ✅ #17
Reference: docs/ADR_MIGRATION_CANDIDATES.md, docs/ARCH_RULES.md

Note from Developer

This issue is resolved via PR #1483. SupportController migrated from legacy inline-action pattern to strict Domain-Based ADR pattern.

Key changes:

  • SupportController rewritten as final, constructor-injected, envelope-wrapped
  • PhotographerSupportService added with 2 typed HTTP methods (getFeaturedUserDashboard, updateFeaturedStatus)
  • 2 new Action classes: RequestFeaturedUserAction, UpdateFeaturedStatusAction
  • UpdateFeaturedStatusDto added with fromArray factory
  • 3 new domain exceptions: ForbiddenSupportActionException (PHOTOGRAPHERS.FORBIDDEN → 403), FeaturedUserFetchFailedException (PHOTOGRAPHERS.FEATURED_USER_FETCH_FAILED → 422), FeaturedStatusUpdateFailedException (PHOTOGRAPHERS.FEATURED_STATUS_UPDATE_FAILED → 409)
  • SUPER_USER guard enforced inside each action — non-SUPER_USER callers receive 403

Affected API endpoints:

Method Endpoint Description API Docs
GET /photographers/support/request-featured-user Returns paginated featured user dashboard. SUPER_USER only. Supports ?search=, ?filter=, ?status=, ?size=, ?page=. request-featured-user.md
POST /photographers/support/update-featured-status Updates featured status for a photographer. SUPER_USER only. status must be 1–4. update-featured-status.md

Error domain codes introduced:

Code HTTP When
PHOTOGRAPHERS.FORBIDDEN 403 Caller is not a SUPER_USER
PHOTOGRAPHERS.FEATURED_USER_FETCH_FAILED 422 Upstream returned error on dashboard fetch
PHOTOGRAPHERS.FEATURED_STATUS_UPDATE_FAILED 409 Upstream returned error on status update

issues.display_title: Issue #1474: Migrate Photographers ReviewController to strict ADR
issues.main_description_html:
Pattern: Category B — already delegates to Action class. Wrap to strict ADR (DTO + Repository + ExceptionMapper + ResponseEnvelopeHelper envelope).
Controller: ReviewController → app/Http/Controllers/Photographers/Reviews/ReviewController.php
Endpoints:

Method Endpoint Action file ~lines
GET /photographers/review Action/GetReview.php 82
GET /photographers/review/{reviewId} Action/GetReviewDetail.php 66
GET /photographers/review/{reviewId}/reply Action/GetReplyReview.php 66
POST /photographers/review/{reviewId}/reply Action/AddReplyReview.php 77
Reference: docs/ADR_MIGRATION_CANDIDATES.md, docs/ARCH_RULES.md

Note from Developer

This issue is resolved via PR #1484. ReviewController replaced with 4 single-action controllers following strict Domain-Based ADR pattern.

Key changes:

  • Legacy ReviewController and Action/*.php files removed — replaced by 4 final single-action controllers
  • ReviewService added with 4 typed HTTP methods (getReviews, getReviewDetail, getReplyReview, addReplyReview)
  • 4 new Action classes: GetReviewAction, GetReviewDetailAction, GetReplyReviewAction, AddReplyReviewAction
  • 2 new domain exceptions: ReviewFetchFailedException (PHOTOGRAPHERS.REVIEW_FETCH_FAILED → 422), ReviewReplyFailedException (PHOTOGRAPHERS.REVIEW_REPLY_FAILED → 422)
  • filter defaults to 'all' inside GetReviewAction if omitted
  • Empty comment guard lives in AddReplyReviewAction (domain error, not ad-hoc controller 422)
  • SID resolution uses SuperUserHelper::isSuperUser() (current convention, not PhotographerHelpers::decideSid)

Affected API endpoints:

Method Endpoint Description API Docs
GET /photographers/review Returns paginated review list. filter defaults to all. SUPER_USER can pass ?sid=. get-review.md
GET /photographers/review/{reviewId} Returns single review detail. SUPER_USER can pass ?sid=. get-review-detail.md
GET /photographers/review/{reviewId}/reply Returns reply thread for a review. SUPER_USER can pass ?sid=. get-reply-review.md
POST /photographers/review/{reviewId}/reply Adds a reply to a review. Returns 422 on empty comment or upstream failure. add-reply-review.md

Error domain codes introduced:

Code HTTP When
PHOTOGRAPHERS.REVIEW_FETCH_FAILED 422 Upstream returned error on any review fetch
PHOTOGRAPHERS.REVIEW_REPLY_FAILED 422 comment is empty, or upstream rejected the reply

issues.display_title: Issue #1473: Migrate Photographers ProfilesController to strict ADR
issues.main_description_html:
Pattern: Category B — already delegates to Action class. Wrap to strict ADR (DTO + Repository + ExceptionMapper + ResponseEnvelopeHelper envelope). No logic change.
Controller: ProfilesController → app/Http/Controllers/Photographers/Profiles/ProfilesController.php
Endpoints:

Method Endpoint Action file ~lines
POST /photographers/apply Action/Apply.php 104
GET /photographers/profile Action/GetProfile.php 65
POST /photographers/profile/upload-avatar Action/UploadAvatar.php 193
DELETE /photographers/profile/delete-avatar Action/DeleteAvatar.php 63
GET /photographers/profile/location Action/GetLocation.php 66
PATCH /photographers/profile/save-location Action/SaveLocation.php 86
POST /photographers/profile/save-sub-location Action/SaveSubLocation.php 80
PATCH /photographers/profile/sub-location/{subLocationId} Action/UpdateSubLocation.php 86
DELETE /photographers/profile/delete-sub-location/{subLocationId} Action/DeleteSubLocation.php 63
Already done (skip): SaveProfileController ✅ #16, NotifyUpdateController ✅
Reference: docs/ADR_MIGRATION_CANDIDATES.md, docs/ARCH_RULES.md

Note from Developer

This issue is resolved via PR #1486. ProfilesController replaced with 9 single-action controllers following strict Domain-Based ADR pattern.

Key changes:

  • Legacy ProfilesController and Action/*.php files removed — replaced by 9 final single-action controllers
  • ProfileService extended with 9 new methods (applyPhotographer, getProfile, uploadAvatar, deleteAvatar, getLocation, saveLocation, saveSubLocation, updateSubLocation, deleteSubLocation)
  • 9 new Action classes, 4 new DTOs (ApplyPhotographerDto, SaveLocationDto, SaveSubLocationDto, UpdateSubLocationDto)
  • 9 new domain exceptions with stable PHOTOGRAPHERS.* codes
  • SID override (?sid=) on reads (getProfile, getLocation) uses SuperUserHelper::isSuperUser() — writes use caller's user_id only
  • apply reads gothruUserId from body (not auth token) — preserved from legacy
  • uploadAvatar retains GD image processing in controller (crop 1:1, resize 512×512) then passes only imageUrl to action

Affected API endpoints:

Method Endpoint Description API Docs
POST /photographers/apply Submits a photographer application. Returns 400 on missing fields or upstream rejection. apply-photographer.md
GET /photographers/profile Returns profile data. SUPER_USER can pass ?sid=. get-profile.md
POST /photographers/profile/upload-avatar Uploads, crops, and resizes avatar (512×512). Requires jpg/jpeg/png, 400–2048px. upload-avatar.md
DELETE /photographers/profile/delete-avatar Deletes avatar from disk and upstream. delete-avatar.md
GET /photographers/profile/location Returns location data. SUPER_USER can pass ?sid=. get-location.md
PATCH /photographers/profile/save-location Saves lat/lng/address. Requires latitude and longitude. save-location.md
POST /photographers/profile/save-sub-location Adds a sub-location. Requires name, addressLine1, latitude, longitude. save-sub-location.md
PATCH /photographers/profile/sub-location/{subLocationId} Partial update of a sub-location. All fields optional. update-sub-location.md
DELETE /photographers/profile/delete-sub-location/{subLocationId} Deletes a sub-location by ID. delete-sub-location.md

Error domain codes introduced:

Code HTTP When
PHOTOGRAPHERS.APPLY_FAILED 400 Upstream rejected the photographer application
PHOTOGRAPHERS.PROFILE_FETCH_FAILED 422 Upstream error on profile fetch
PHOTOGRAPHERS.AVATAR_UPLOAD_FAILED 409 Upstream rejected the avatar URL
PHOTOGRAPHERS.AVATAR_DELETE_FAILED 409 Upstream error on avatar delete
PHOTOGRAPHERS.LOCATION_FETCH_FAILED 422 Upstream error on location fetch
PHOTOGRAPHERS.LOCATION_SAVE_FAILED 409 Upstream error on location save
PHOTOGRAPHERS.SUB_LOCATION_SAVE_FAILED 409 Upstream error on sub-location save
PHOTOGRAPHERS.SUB_LOCATION_UPDATE_FAILED 409 Upstream error on sub-location update
PHOTOGRAPHERS.SUB_LOCATION_DELETE_FAILED 409 Upstream error on sub-location delete

issues.display_title: Issue #1478: Migrate Photographers AvailabilitiesController to strict ADR
issues.main_description_html:
Pattern: Category B — already delegates to Action class. Wrap to strict ADR (DTO + Repository + ExceptionMapper + ResponseEnvelopeHelper envelope).
Controller: AvailabilitiesController → app/Http/Controllers/Photographers/Availabilities/AvailabilitiesController.php
Endpoints:

Method Endpoint Action file ~lines
GET /photographers/availabilities Action/GetAvailabilities.php 64
GET /photographers/availabilities/list Action/GetListAvailabilities.php 55
DELETE /photographers/availabilities/delete/{availabilityId} Action/Delete.php 60
Reference: docs/ADR_MIGRATION_CANDIDATES.md, docs/ARCH_RULES.md

Note from Developer

This issue is resolved via PR #1482. AvailabilitiesController migrated from legacy HelperClass-based passthrough to strict Domain-Based ADR pattern.

Key changes:

  • AvailabilitiesController rewritten as final, constructor-injected, envelope-wrapped
  • AvailabilityService added with 3 typed HTTP methods (getAvailabilities, getListAvailabilities, deleteAvailability)
  • 3 new Action classes: GetAvailabilitiesAction, GetListAvailabilitiesAction, DeleteAvailabilityAction
  • 2 new domain exceptions with stable codes (PHOTOGRAPHERS.AVAILABILITY_FETCH_FAILED, PHOTOGRAPHERS.AVAILABILITY_DELETE_FAILED)
  • SUPER_USER ?sid= override preserved on getAvailabilities via PhotographerHelpers::decideSid()
  • Legacy Action/ files preserved untouched

Affected API endpoints:

Method Endpoint Description API Docs
GET /photographers/availabilities Returns paginated list of the authenticated photographer's availabilities. Supports ?size= and ?page=. SUPER_USER can pass ?sid=<userId>. get-availabilities.md
GET /photographers/availabilities/list Returns all available availability type options (static list). get-availabilities-list.md
DELETE /photographers/availabilities/delete/{availabilityId} Deletes a specific availability by ID. Returns 409 if the upstream delete fails. delete-availability.md

Error domain codes introduced:

Code HTTP When
PHOTOGRAPHERS.AVAILABILITY_FETCH_FAILED 422 Upstream returned error on fetch
PHOTOGRAPHERS.AVAILABILITY_DELETE_FAILED 409 Upstream returned error on delete

issues.display_title: Issue #1475: Migrate Photographers PortfolioController to strict ADR
issues.main_description_html:
Pattern: Category B — already delegates to Action class. Wrap to strict ADR (DTO + Repository + ExceptionMapper + ResponseEnvelopeHelper envelope).
Controller: PortfolioController → app/Http/Controllers/Photographers/Portfolio/PortfolioController.php
Endpoints:

Method Endpoint Action file ~lines
GET /photographers/portfolio/{portfolioType} Action/Get.php 74
POST /photographers/portfolio/save Action/Save.php 82
DELETE /photographers/portfolio/delete/{idPortfolio} Action/Delete.php 61
PATCH /photographers/portfolio/{portfolioId}/order Action/UpdateOrder.php 77
Reference: docs/ADR_MIGRATION_CANDIDATES.md, docs/ARCH_RULES.md

Note from Developer

This issue is resolved via PR #1480. PortfolioController migrated from legacy HelperClass-based passthrough to strict Domain-Based ADR pattern.

Key changes:

  • PortfolioController rewritten as final, constructor-injected, envelope-wrapped
  • PortfolioService added with 4 typed HTTP methods (get, save, delete, updateOrder)
  • 4 new Action classes: GetPortfolioAction, SavePortfolioAction, DeletePortfolioAction, UpdatePortfolioOrderAction
  • SavePortfolioDto added with fromArray factory for save payload
  • 4 new domain exceptions with stable codes (PHOTOGRAPHERS.PORTFOLIO_FETCH_FAILED, PHOTOGRAPHERS.PORTFOLIO_SAVE_FAILED, PHOTOGRAPHERS.PORTFOLIO_DELETE_FAILED, PHOTOGRAPHERS.PORTFOLIO_UPDATE_FAILED)
  • Portfolio type validation added at controller boundary (getPortfolio) — returns 400 before hitting action on invalid type

Affected API endpoints:

Method Endpoint Description API Docs
GET /photographers/portfolio/{portfolioType} Returns portfolio data for the given type (google, gothru, panorra, matterport). Returns 400 on invalid type. get-portfolio.md
POST /photographers/portfolio/save Saves a portfolio entry. Returns 400 on missing required fields, 409 on upstream save failure. save-portfolio.md
DELETE /photographers/portfolio/delete/{idPortfolio} Deletes a portfolio entry by ID. Returns 409 on upstream delete failure. delete-portfolio.md
PATCH /photographers/portfolio/{portfolioId}/order Updates the display order of a portfolio entry. Returns 400 on missing order, 409 on upstream failure. update-portfolio-order.md

Error domain codes introduced:

Code HTTP When
PHOTOGRAPHERS.PORTFOLIO_FETCH_FAILED 422 Upstream returned error on portfolio fetch
PHOTOGRAPHERS.PORTFOLIO_SAVE_FAILED 409 Upstream returned error on save
PHOTOGRAPHERS.PORTFOLIO_DELETE_FAILED 409 Upstream returned error on delete
PHOTOGRAPHERS.PORTFOLIO_UPDATE_FAILED 409 Upstream returned error on order update

issues.display_title: Issue #1487: Migrate Nadir: Custom Nadir Endpoints
issues.main_description_html:
Pattern: Category B — already delegates to Action class. Wrap to strict ADR (DTO + ExceptionMapper + ResponseEnvelopeHelper envelope). No logic change.

Controller: Tours\NadirController → split into 3 single-action controllers.

Endpoints:

Method Endpoint Current method
GET /nadir/custom getCustomNadir
POST /nadir/upload-custom uploadCustomNadir
DELETE /nadir/delete-custom deleteCustomNadir

Reference: docs/ADR_MIGRATION_CANDIDATES.md, docs/ARCH_RULES.md

Note from Developer

This issue is resolved via PR #1492. Tours\NadirController@{getCustomNadir,uploadCustomNadir,deleteCustomNadir} migrated from legacy passthrough handlers to strict Domain-Based ADR pattern.

Key changes:

  • Split into 3 single-action controllers under App\Http\Controllers\Tours\Nadir\: GetCustomNadirController, UploadCustomNadirController, DeleteCustomNadirController, each with its own *Action and *Dto
  • 4 new Tours domain exceptions with stable codes (TOURS.NADIR_FILE_NOT_FOUND, TOURS.NADIR_FILE_NOT_IMAGE, TOURS.CUSTOM_NADIR_UPLOAD_FAILED, TOURS.CUSTOM_NADIR_DELETE_FAILED), wired into ToursExceptionHttpMapper
  • ToursRepository::resetUseGlobalNadir() replaces the inline use_global_nadir UPDATE; delete flow reuses TourArchiveRepository::getUserSubscription()
  • Legacy handler classes deleted; corresponding methods/imports removed from Tours\NadirController
  • Follow-up: switched all 3 success responses from plain responseMessages to AES encryptResult, matching every other encrypted endpoint in the codebase — error paths stay plain (errorResponse)

Affected API endpoints:

Method Endpoint Description API Docs
GET /nadir/custom Returns the custom nadir image URL for a moderation (encrypted envelope), or null when none is set. get-custom-nadir.md
POST /nadir/upload-custom Uploads and stores a custom nadir image for a moderation, generates polar variants, resets use_global_nadir. upload-custom-nadir.md
DELETE /nadir/delete-custom Deletes the moderation's custom nadir image and its polar variants. delete-custom-nadir.md

Error domain codes introduced:

Code HTTP When
TOURS.NADIR_FILE_NOT_FOUND 409 Upload temp path empty / stale old-file reference
TOURS.NADIR_FILE_NOT_IMAGE 409 Uploaded source is not PNG/JPEG
TOURS.CUSTOM_NADIR_UPLOAD_FAILED 409 Image is neither square nor 2:1 equirectangular
TOURS.CUSTOM_NADIR_DELETE_FAILED 500 No custom nadir file exists to delete (preserves legacy fall-through-to-500)
